product: Databricks Terraform provider supports Lakebase resources
tagline: You can use the Databricks Terraform provider to create Lakebase resources such as database catalogs, database instances, and synced tables.
what_it_does: You can use the Databricks Terraform provider to create Lakebase resources such as database catalogs, database instances, and synced tables. This lets you set up and manage Lakebase resources with infrastructure as code. There was an error while loading.
